description.value: Since ancient times, the mightiest bastaal beast tamers would draw out the true fighting spirit of their companion beasts by feeding the creatures a draft incorporating the bastaal's own blood. All animal companions, pets, familiars, and bonded animals you have gain the @UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-featsfeatures.Item.PlhPpdwIV0rIAJ8K]{Bastaal Ferocity} feat, and gain one reaction per round they can use only for Bastaal Ferocity. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.aedenir-homebrew.aed-featsfeatures.Item.zZOycr00XDVTKuXa]{Undying Ferocity} ancestry feat, all animal companions, pets, familiars, and bonded animals you have also gain the benefits of that feat when using the Bastaal Ferocity reaction.

value.value: animal companion, Pet, or Bonded Animal
